creator: ws@au.dyndns.ws
text:
Clicking the "Quicksearch Help" link on the Bugzilla webpage prompts for a login even though performing a "Quick Search" does not require to be logged in.

After logging in, clicking "Quicksearch Help" link displays this error:

FreeBSD Bugzilla – Authorization Required

Sorry, you aren't a member of the 'freebsd_committer' group, and so you are not authorized to access administrative pages.
Please press Back and try again.

Presumably a privilege requirement has been inadvertently set for the "Quicksearch Help" page?
